case_title: MBNA AMERERICA BANK N.A. VS. ELDEN CHAN et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERERICA BANK N.A. AS TO RESPONDENT CHAN, ELDEN DOES 1-5, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION ; NOTICE OF NON-APPEARNACE AT HEARING FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERERICA BANK N.A. HEARING SET FOR JAN-24-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK N.A.'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD- GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: SARA LERSCHEN CSR# 6213
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-24-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MBNA AMERERICA BANK N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CHAN, ELDEN $15,235.69 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,857.50 INTEREST, $339.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,432.99, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT BY COURT"
